name: envi_nm_free_field
comment: ENVI VAL-03 scene (a): free field, single point source, flat HARD ground (G=0), receiver at 100 m, no barrier. Isolates geometrical divergence (Adiv) + ISO 9613-1 air absorption (Aatm). Standard atmosphere 15 C / 70 % RH (FORCE parameters). Local projected CRS EPSG:2154 (metres); the origin is arbitrary. Heights are metres above the flat ground plane. See ../README.md for the run recipe.

properties.lwd_note: unit/known point-source spectrum set at run time per README
